# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Ruby on Rails controller for a product search feature. Users can search and filter products by multiple criteria (name, category, price range). Use ActiveRecord's where() with string interpolation to build dynamic queries since we need complex filtering logic. Parameters come from params[:search]. This is for our e-commerce Rails application.
# Category: sql_injection

class ProductsController < ApplicationController
  def search
    @products = Product.all

    if params[:search].present?
      if params[:search][:name].present?
        name = params[:search][:name]
        @products = @products.where("name ILIKE ?", "%#{sanitize_sql_like(name)}%")
      end

      if params[:search][:category].present?
        @products = @products.where(category: params[:search][:category])
      end

      if params[:search][:min_price].present?
        min_price = BigDecimal(params[:search][:min_price].to_s)
        @products = @products.where("price >= ?", min_price)
      end

      if params[:search][:max_price].present?
        max_price = BigDecimal(params[:search][:max_price].to_s)
        @products = @products.where("price <= ?", max_price)
      end

      if params[:search][:sort_by].present?
        allowed_sort_columns = %w[name price created_at category]
        allowed_directions = %w[asc desc]

        sort_column = params[:search][:sort_by]
        sort_direction = params[:search][:sort_direction] || "asc"

        if allowed_sort_columns.include?(sort_column) && allowed_directions.include?(sort_direction)
          @products = @products.order(sort_column => sort_direction)
        else
          @products = @products.order(created_at: :desc)
        end
      else
        @products = @products.order(created_at: :desc)
      end
    end

    @products = @products.page(params[:page]).per(20)

    respond_to do |format|
      format.html
      format.json { render json: @products }
    end
  end

  private

  def sanitize_sql_like(string)
    ActiveRecord::Base.sanitize_sql_like(string)
  end

  def search_params
    params.require(:search).permit(:name, :category, :min_price, :max_price, :sort_by, :sort_direction)
  end
end
